creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: cy
Date: Mon Sep 30 21:02:13 2013
New Revision: 328875
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/328875

Log:
  Update 3.5.1 --> 3.5.2
  
  PR:		182520
  Submitted by:	skreuzer

Added:
  head/sysutils/cfengine35/files/cf-monitord.in   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/sysutils/cfengine35/Makefile
  head/sysutils/cfengine35/distinfo
  head/sysutils/cfengine35/pkg-plist

Modified: head/sysutils/cfengine35/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/cfengine35/Makefile	Mon Sep 30 20:59:03 2013	(r328874)
+++ head/sysutils/cfengine35/Makefile	Mon Sep 30 21:02:13 2013	(r328875)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	cfengine
-PORTVERSION=	3.5.1
+PORTVERSION=	3.5.2
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://cfengine.com/source-code/download?file=
 
@@ -19,7 +19,7 @@ FETCH_BEFORE_ARGS=	-o ${DISTDIR}/${DISTF
 
 CONFLICTS=	cfengine-[234]*
 
-USE_RC_SUBR=	cf-execd cf-serverd
+USE_RC_SUBR=	cf-execd cf-serverd cf-monitord
 
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 USE_OPENSSL=	yes

Modified: head/sysutils/cfengine35/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/cfengine35/distinfo	Mon Sep 30 20:59:03 2013	(r328874)
+++ head/sysutils/cfengine35/distinfo	Mon Sep 30 21:02:13 2013	(r328875)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (cfengine-3.5.1.tar.gz) = 4d2484d5bdeaa5b6d5435b58a92a8da2bafc18294bb8eae348614e663f934429
-SIZE (cfengine-3.5.1.tar.gz) = 1509646
+SHA256 (cfengine-3.5.2.tar.gz) = 0362224d2968929cb4a1f2b4e98efbb6f5d1ecea5e9e9ae3e86fa8d083a70d6a
+SIZE (cfengine-3.5.2.tar.gz) = 1560750

Added: head/sysutils/cfengine35/files/cf-monitord.in
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/sysutils/cfengine35/files/cf-monitord.in	Mon Sep 30 21:02:13 2013	(r328875)
@@ -0,0 +1,26 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+# PROVIDE: cf-monitord
+# REQUIRE: LOGIN
+# KEYWORD: shutdown
+#
+# Add the following line to /etc/rc.conf[.local] to enable cf-monitord(8)
+#
+# cf_monitord_enable (bool):        Set to "NO" by default.
+#                               Set it to "YES" to enable cf-monitord.
+# cf_monitord_flags (str):          Custom additional arguments to be passed
+#                               to cf-monitord (default empty).
+#
+
+. /etc/rc.subr
+
+name="cf_monitord"
+rcvar=cf_monitord_enable
+
+load_rc_config $name
+
+: ${cf_monitord_enable="NO"}
+
+run_rc_command "$1"
